flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Jacksonville University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($42.4k → $47.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Jacksonville University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($42.4k → $47.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Jacksonville University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Jacksonville University are 43% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($68.0k vs $47.6k).
